backend.choice_reason: Docker and uv were unavailable, so phase-1 used a model-local Python 3.10 venv with pip as the lowest-risk executable backend.

history.mitigation: Replaced upstream CUDA-specific torch/torchaudio pins with a model-local CPU fallback dependency plan.
Raised kaldi_native_fbank from unavailable 1.15 to installable 1.22.3 after source-level API usage review.
Pinned setuptools==80.9.0 so kaldiio could import pkg_resources during repo-native import.

notes: Phase-1 target passed on the standalone FireRedAsr2 AED repo-native path using model-local weights and CPU fallback on a host without GPU tooling.
No runtime-family switch to FireRedAsr2System or FireRedASR2-LLM was performed.
The selected shared fixture was already 16kHz 16-bit mono PCM WAV, so no ffmpeg conversion was required.
